hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage":"Hooks are active. Session started at '$(date)'."}'
INPUT=$(cat); PROMPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.prompt // ""'); echo "[$(date)] User prompt: $PROMPT" >> /tmp/codex-hooks.log

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qEi 'rm\s+-rf\s+(/|~|\$HOME)'; then echo 'Blocked: dangerous rm command' >&2; exit 2; fi; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"defer"}}'

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); echo "[$(date)] PRE shell: $CMD" >> /tmp/codex-hooks.log; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"defer"}}'
INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // "unknown"'); echo "[$(date)] PRE apply_patch: $FILE" >> /tmp/codex-hooks.log

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); EXIT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_output.exit_code // "?"'); echo "[$(date)] POST shell (exit $EXIT): $CMD" >> /tmp/codex-hooks.log
INPUT=$(cat); ACTIVE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.stop_hook_active // false'); if [ "$ACTIVE" = "true" ]; then exit 0; fi; echo "[$(date)] Agent stopped" >> /tmp/codex-hooks.log
